title: 7 Natural Creams for Obese Individuals with Cirrhosis to Promote Healing
description: Astragalus membranaceus creams have been studied for their potential benefits in managing cirrhosis, a condition where the liver becomes scarred and loses function. The cream is made from the roots of the Astragalus membranaceus plant, which contains saponins, flavonoids, and polysaccharides. These compounds may help to improve liver function, reduce inflammation, and promote the growth of healthy liver cells.
